## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.7.1

### 📹 Cameras
- Keeps native WebRTC live sessions alive through the APK-style camera keepalive path while Home Assistant owns the WebRTC offer.
- Preserves the existing X-Sense ticket/signaling flow in the vendored Python X-Sense client path.

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Reduces repeated WebRTC ICE candidate debug noise while keeping useful session counts and signal summaries in the logs.
